title: Blanket Decor
description: Retextures beds to look like Llama carpet deisgns
body: A small pack I made for myself when I had a lot of free time, and I am pretty sure I have seen someone else do it before me. I used the llama carpet decor and applied it to beds, to make them more unique, and it turned out surprisingly well. Even made one for wandering trader, and it can be used if you don't like the default blue one. I don't really want to make a whole tutorial, but if you know how packs work, you will figure it out.
